titleStmt.title: SII 26.551: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 551. (A.R. No. 521 of 1909.) TENKĀŚI, TENKASI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the same maṇḍapa.

p.hi: Tribhº Parākrama pāṇḍyadēva Year 31+1, Karkkaṭaka (Āḍi) 21, śu., 14 Monday, Uttirāḍam = 1454 A.D. July 8; f.d.n. ·94. The day in the month karkkaṭaka was 10.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift, made by the king, of the two villages of Tañjāvūrppaṟṟu and Taṭṭāṉkuḷappaṟṟu, in Nallūruppaṟṟu in Teṉṉāri-nāḍu as devadāna to the god Viśvanātha and the goddess Ulagamuḻuḍaiyanāchchiyār. The villages Śeṅkōṭṭai, Ilattūr, Veḻḻaimuṭṭappaṟṟu, Nallūr and Paimpoḻil are mentioned in connection with the description of the boundaries of the gift villages.
The signatory was a certain Kiḍārattūr-ūḍaiyāṇ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kojaṭilavarmmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaścakravattikaḷ śrīparākramapāṇḍya devaṟku yāṇṭu muppattoṉṟāvatiṉ Etirāvatu karkkaṭakañāyiṟṟu Irupattoṉṟāntiyatiyum pūrvvapakṣattu ccaturddaśiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyumpeṟṟa Uttirāṭattu nāḷ Uṭaiyār viśvanādhan
nācciyār Ulakamuḻutumuṭaiya nācciyāṟkut tevatāṉam Ākaviṭṭa teṉvārināṭṭu nallūrppaṟṟil tañcāvūrppaṟṟukkum taṭṭāṉkuḷappaṟṟukkum perunāṉkellaiyāvatu kiḻelkai ceṅkoṭṭaiyil niṉṟum Ilattūṟkuppokiṟavaḻikku meṟku teṉ Elkai
ceṅkoṭṭaiyil teṟkil piḷḷaiyār koyilukkum Ivvūril niṉṟum nallūṟkup pokiṟavaḻikku Uṭaiyār viśvanāthan tevatāṉamāṉa vaḷḷaimuṭṭap paṟṟukkum vaṭakku mel Elkainallūril niṉṟum paimpoḻilukkuppokiṟa vaḻikkuk kiḻakku vaṭaelkai
Āṟṟukkutteṟkuāka Iṉṉāṉkelkaikkuṭpaṭṭapaṟṟil nañcey puñcai māvaṭai maravaṭai paṭṭaṭai koṭittoṭṭa maṟṟum Uṭpaṭṭa palavakaiyu muppattu Oṉṟā vatiṉ Etirāvatu mutalukku tevatāṉamāka viṭṭuk kaiyāṇṭu koḷḷumpaṭi kaṟpitta Aḷavukku Immariyātile
Ivvāṇṭu mutal Ivvolaipiṭipāṭākakkoṇṭu candrādityavaṟ cellakkalliluñ cempilum veṭṭi Ivvālaiyam Uḷḷa Aḷavuntevatāṉamākak kaiyāṇṭu koḷḷavum pāṟka Ivai kiṭārattūr Uṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu § tulyam §
Digital edition of SII 26.551 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
